reason: Browser-use feature successfully allows agent to open a browser, navigate to a URL, retrieve page metadata, and display live browser preview with tool call details.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing SuperAgent interface with sidebar containing list of agents.
Found and clicked the "QA-20260508-234805-vszg" agent in the sidebar — Agent chat interface opened, displaying message input box and agent configuration panels.
Clicked on message input textbox (ref=e207) — Textbox became focused and active for input.
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." into the input field — Message text appeared in the input field.
Clicked the "Send message" button (ref=e312) — Message was sent successfully and agent status changed to "working" with a timer starting.
Waited up to 3 minutes for response containing "Example Domain" — Agent completed the task in approximately 9 seconds and response was received.
Verified agent response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly states: 'The page title is "Example Domain".' Response was displayed in chat with tool call cards showing:
Took final screenshot documenting complete result — Screenshot captured showing:
